zh.lifeSummary: 當James Metcalfe於大約1389年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾納帕時，他的父親John Metcalfe32歲，母親Alice De Ireby28歲。他於1414年與Gelsone Gibson在英國越可爾阿斯可利格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1415年住在英國英格蘭越可爾文斯萊達爾。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1472年在英國越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾阿斯可利格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Metcalfe于大约1389年出生在英国英格兰越可爾納帕时，他的父亲John Metcalfe32岁，母亲Alice De Ireby28岁。他于1414年与Gelsone Gibson在英国越可爾阿斯可利格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1415年住在英国英格兰越可爾文斯萊達爾。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1472年在英国越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾阿斯可利格。

nameMeanings.name: Metcalfe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Metcalf
meanings: English (Yorkshire): apparently a nickname from Middle English mete ‘meat, food’ + calf ‘calf’, i.e. ‘calf to be fattened up for eating’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When James Metcalfe was born about 1389, in Nappa, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Metcalfe, was 32 and his mother, Alice De Ireby, was 28. He married Gelsone Gibson in 1414, in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1415. He registered for military service in 1415. He died in 1472, in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Metcalfe est né environ 1389, à Nappa, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Metcalfe, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice De Ireby, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Gelsone Gibson en 1414, à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Wensleydale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1415. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé en 1472, à Nappa by Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Oswald Churchyard, Askrigg, North: Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als James Metcalfe um 1389 in Nappa, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Metcalfe 32 und seine Mutter Alice De Ireby 28. Er hat 1414 in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England Gelsone Gibson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1415 hat er in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1472 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Gelsone Gibson nel 1414, nel Askrigg, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1415. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì nel 1472, nel Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Metcalfeが約1389年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパで生まれた時，父John Metcalfeは32歳，母Alice De Irebyは28歳であった。1414年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググでGelsone Gibsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウエンスリーダルに住んでいた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1472年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパ ビー アスクリググで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアアスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Metcalfe(이)가 대략 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 나파에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Metcalfe(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Ireby(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1414년 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에서 Gelsone Gibson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1415년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웬슬리데일에서 살았다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1472년 영국 요르크실르 나파 비 아스크리그에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Oswald Churchyard, Askrigg, North: Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Metcalfe nasceu aproximadamente 1389, em Nappa, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Metcalfe, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Ireby, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Gelsone Gibson em 1414, em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1415. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 1472, em Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Saint Oswald Churchyard, Askrigg, North: Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Metcalfe родился около 1389 г. в местности наппа, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Metcalfe было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice De Ireby, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Gelsone Gibson в 1414 г. в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности венслидеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1415 году. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1472 г. в местности наппа би аскриг, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности аскриг, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Metcalfe nació aproximadamente 1389, en Nappa, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Metcalfe, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice De Ireby, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gelsone Gibson en 1414, en Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1415. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió en 1472, en Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
